Arista Networks Q4: Will Tepper's Sell-Off, Bearish Charts Overshadow A 5% Upside?
data.description: ANET stock faces bearish momentum ahead of Q4 earnings, hedge fund exits position. Stock currently maps against Wall Street estimates with potential for bounce near 200-day SMA. Analysts see 5% upside with consensus rating of Buy and $282.78 price target.

data.title: Venture Global's Pullback Presents Big Opportunity, Analyst Says
data.description: Analyst sees major upside potential in Venture Global LNG, citing its disruptive model, fast execution, and exposure to favorable LNG spreads.

data.title: Nissin warns of steep profit slide but sees solid core business
data.description:
Key Takeaways:


	Nissin Foods projected that profits for 2024 would fall between 38% and 41%
	But other figures show that underlying revenue from China grew nearly 10% in the first nine months of last year


  

By Lee Shih Ta
